title: Maximum Number of K-Divisible Components
titleCn: 可以被 K 整除连通块的最大数目

testcases.input: n = 5, edges = [[0,2],[1,2],[1,3],[2,4]], values = [1,8,1,4,4], k = 6 Output: 2 Explanation: We remove the edge connecting node 1 with 2. The resulting split is valid because: - The value of the component containing nodes 1 and 3 is values[1] + values[3] = 12. - The value of the component containing nodes 0, 2, and 4 is values[0] + values[2] + values[4] = 6. It can be shown that no other valid split has more than 2 connected components.
testcases.expectedOutput: 2 Explanation: We remove the edge connecting node 1 with 2. The resulting split is valid because: - The value of the component containing nodes 1 and 3 is values[1] + values[3] = 12. - The value of the component containing nodes 0, 2, and 4 is values[0] + values[2] + values[4] = 6. It can be shown that no other valid split has more than 2 connected components.

testcases.input: n = 7, edges = [[0,1],[0,2],[1,3],[1,4],[2,5],[2,6]], values = [3,0,6,1,5,2,1], k = 3 Output: 3 Explanation: We remove the edge connecting node 0 with 2, and the edge connecting node 0 with 1. The resulting split is valid because: - The value of the component containing node 0 is values[0] = 3. - The value of the component containing nodes 2, 5, and 6 is values[2] + values[5] + values[6] = 9. - The value of the component containing nodes 1, 3, and 4 is values[1] + values[3] + values[4] = 6. It can be shown that no other valid split has more than 3 connected components.
testcases.expectedOutput: 3 Explanation: We remove the edge connecting node 0 with 2, and the edge connecting node 0 with 1. The resulting split is valid because: - The value of the component containing node 0 is values[0] = 3. - The value of the component containing nodes 2, 5, and 6 is values[2] + values[5] + values[6] = 9. - The value of the component containing nodes 1, 3, and 4 is values[1] + values[3] + values[4] = 6. It can be shown that no other valid split has more than 3 connected components.
